scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p js && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js js/alpine.min.js && cp node_modules/@alpinejs/intersect/dist/cdn.min.js js/alpine-intersect.min.js
scripts.build: tailwindcss -i tailwind.input.css -o styles.css --minify && postcss styles.css -o styles.css && node -e "const{gzipSync,brotliCompressSync}=require('zlib'),fs=require('fs'),css=fs.readFileSync('styles.css');fs.writeFileSync('styles.css.gz',gzipSync(css,{level:9}));fs.writeFileSync('styles.css.br',brotliCompressSync(css));"
